opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My upper right side feels completely swollen and heavy, I am exhausted constantly, and I am terrified my liver is diseased.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've had a dull heavy ache under my right ribs for a while but it's got a lot worse over the last couple of days and I'm really worried something is seriously wrong with my liver.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've felt it on and off for a while, but it clearly stepped up about two days ago
symptom_narrative.character: a dull, heavy, constant ache — not sharp, not gripping, more like a fullness and pressure
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: uncomfortable and frightening rather than agonising — it doesn't stop me moving around
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the upper right side of my belly, up under the ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's there most of the time, and it's been more noticeable the last two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really seems to change it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I can't pin down anything that makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been really tired and run down. No fevers or chills that I've noticed, I haven't been vomiting, and I don't think my eyes or skin have gone yellow.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the tiredness is really limiting — I don't feel like doing much, and the worry is eating at me

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I carry a lot of weight around my middle and have done for years

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: I don't really drink — barely ever, and never heavily
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I don't move around much and I drink a fair bit of soft drink and juice through the day
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: worried enough about my liver that I couldn't wait for a normal appointment

objective_data_offered.value: around 115 kg on my home scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from home scales, not clinically measured

objective_data_offered.value: I checked in the mirror and the whites of my eyes and my skin don't look yellow to me
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-inspection only; mild jaundice can be missed by the patient and cannot be confirmed without an in-person look and bloods
